overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the Saint Denis harbor area on a foggy morning. The character traverses wooden docks, passes industrial buildings and steamboats, and climbs onto a ship deck overlooking the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shipping dock with cargo crates and moored steamboats

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock past cargo crates and a wooden cart, approaching the harbor buildings

entered.detail: large white and black steamboat with multiple decks moored at the dock
wooden wagon with red wheels parked on the dock
stacked wooden shipping crates and boxes scattered along the dock
tall wooden cargo crane for loading ships
two-story wooden harbor building with clock tower and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy wooden dock in an industrial harbor. A large steamboat is moored on the right, while cargo crates and a wooden cart are scattered along the planks. The harbor master building with its distinctive clock tower is visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor building entrance with gathered NPCs

events.description: character slows slightly while navigating around NPCs near the harbor building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the harbor master building and navigating through a small crowd of NPCs gathered near the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of dock workers standing and conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: wooden stairs leading up to the steamboat deck

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the harbor master building, passing by groups of NPCs gathered near the entrance. The building's clock tower dominates the view ahead, while wooden stairs leading up to the steamboat become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: steamboat upper deck with rigging and smokestacks

events.description: character climbs stairs from dock level onto the steamboat deck, gaining elevated vantage point

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs onto the steamboat deck and beginning to walk along the upper level

entered.detail: wooden planked deck of the steamboat with metal railings
tall red and black painted smokestacks on the steamboat
network of ropes and masts on the ship

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs onto the steamboat deck, transitioning from ground level to an elevated perspective. The view opens up to show the ship's smokestacks and rigging, while the harbor master building is now visible below. The wooden deck of the ship replaces the dock planks underfoot.

events.description: character turns slightly left while walking along the ship deck to follow the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper deck of the steamboat, overlooking the harbor and dock area from above

entered.detail: calm water of the harbor basin visible beyond the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated deck of the steamboat, the character overlooks the entire harbor scene from above. The harbor master building is now far below to the left, while the ship's smokestacks rise nearby. The view extends out over the water and surrounding industrial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial harbor that transitions from a ground-level walk along the docks to an elevated vantage point atop a steamboat. It begins with the character traversing wooden planks past cargo crates and a moored steamboat, moving steadily toward a distant harbor master building and its prominent clock tower. As the character approaches the building and passes groups of NPCs, the perspective shifts toward a set of wooden stairs leading upward. The scene then ascends onto the steamboat deck, where the dock planks are replaced by the ship's flooring and the view opens up to reveal smokestacks and rigging. Finally, the camera moves along the elevated deck to overlook the entire harbor, leaving the clock tower far below to the left while extending the view across the water and surrounding industrial structures.
